signals.title: Villages at Elder Creek — master plan / production housing package
signals.summary: Housing development package with subdivision cues. Early pursuit window before trade contractors lock in.
signals.raw_excerpt: Villages at Elder Creek Unit production housing subdivision master plan

signals.title: Gerber Creek / Lelani Village subdivisions — site development
signals.summary: Linked subdivision package. Strong candidate for fencing, concrete, site work, and landscaping before vertical trades saturate.
signals.raw_excerpt: Gerber Creek and Lelani Village Subdivisions grading drainage fencing perimeter

signals.title: Northlake 36 Homes — planned residential community
signals.summary: Named housing community still producing lot/permit breadcrumbs. Chase developer for package awards.
